# CrushMeter.cz

> AI-powered relationship DNA analysis and compatibility testing.

## Purpose
CrushMeter uses advanced LLM models to analyze relationship dynamics, communication styles, and astrological compatibility to provide deep insights into romantic connections.

## Key Services
- Relationship Compatibility Test (Free/Paid)
- Deep Dive Analysis (Power dynamics, Red Flags, Future Predictions)
- Relationship Blog (Psychology and communication tips)

## URLs
- Main Tool: https://crushmeter.cz/
- Blog: https://crushmeter.cz/blog.html
- Terms: https://crushmeter.cz/obchodni-podminky.html
